# Starry Nights and the Tapestry of Memories
## Scripture
"And God said, 'Let there be lights in the vault of the sky to separate the day from the night, and let them serve as signs to mark sacred times, and days and years.'" - Genesis 1:14

## Reflection
As we gaze up at the starry night sky, we're reminded of the celestial calendar that God has created. The changing patterns of the stars and constellations mark the passage of time, evoking memories of special moments and experiences. Just as the stars serve as signs to mark sacred times, our memories of God's faithfulness in the past can serve as beacons to guide us through the present and into the future. As we reflect on the tapestry of our lives, we can see how God has woven together moments of joy and sorrow, triumph and struggle, to create a beautiful narrative of His love and care.

## Prayer
Dear Heavenly Father, as we marvel at the starry night sky, we're reminded of the intricate tapestry of our lives. Help us to see how You've woven together every moment, every experience, to create a beautiful narrative of Your love. May our memories of Your faithfulness in the past guide us through the present and into the future, and may we trust in Your sovereignty over all of creation. Thank You for the celestial calendar that marks the passage of time, and for the promise that You are always with us, guiding and directing us. Amen.
